Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Acute Hospital Care at Home Patient and Hospital Data Files │ January 2024 │ V 1.0 
2 
AHCAH_WVR_SUBMSN_ID 
LABEL: 
AHCAH Waiver Submission ID 
DESCRIPTION: The AHCAH waiver submission ID. The waiver ID is assigned to the participating hospital CCN (CMS 
Certification Number); there is only one AHCAH_WVR_SUBMSN_ID for each CCN. 
SHORT NAME: AHCAH_WVR_SUBMSN_ID 
LONG NAME: AHCAH_WVR_SUBMSN_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
15 
FILE(S):
